prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `60d73be6`.
codex_response:
`60d73be6` is the cross-mirroring task: detect the full horizontal and vertical line of the same color, treat them as reflection axes, and copy every non-background, non-axis cell to its horizontal, vertical, and double-reflected positions, clipping anything that falls out of bounds. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples.

The generator stays close to the observed family: grey background, one full cross, a single multicolor source motif only in the top-left or top-right quadrant, moderate sparse-to-clustered occupancy, and frequent contact with the top edge, outer side, and axis-adjacent side so the outputs resemble the originals rather than generic random noise. No new primitive was added; `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was unchanged.
